task_description: Add Korean/English language selection feature to safegai.co.kr homepage. Implement i18n with /ko/ and /en/ URL prefixes, locale JSON files, LanguageContext, KOR/ENG toggle in menus, localStorage persistence, SEO meta tags (hreflang, og:locale, title, description), and translate ALL page content to professional business English for AI safety management domain.

verification.summary: vite build completes successfully. No test framework exists in this project. All 32+ page components updated with i18n translations.
